ADB_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Use bundled adb, or configure adb path in settings

ADB_NOT_FOUND_LINUX_ARM64.suggestion: Bundled adb is not available on this platform (Linux ARM64). Install via package manager: sudo apt install adb, or configure a custom adb path in settings

SCRCPY_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Use bundled scrcpy, or configure scrcpy path in settings

SCRCPY_NOT_FOUND_LINUX_ARM64.suggestion: Bundled scrcpy is not available on this platform (Linux ARM64). Install via package manager: sudo apt install scrcpy, or configure a custom scrcpy path in settings

DEVICE_UNAUTHORIZED.suggestion: Confirm the USB debugging authorization dialog on your Android device, then rescan

DEVICE_OFFLINE.suggestion: Check USB connection or reconnect the cable

MIRROR_ALREADY_RUNNING.message: A mirror session is already running on this device

WIRELESS_CONNECT_FAILED.suggestion: Make sure your phone and computer are on the same network, and USB debugging or wireless debugging is enabled

WIRELESS_IP_NOT_FOUND.message: Could not get device LAN IP
WIRELESS_IP_NOT_FOUND.suggestion: Make sure your phone is connected to WiFi and on the same network as your computer

WIRELESS_DISCOVERY_FAILED.suggestion: Make sure ADB is available and wireless debugging is enabled in Android settings

CAPABILITY_DETECTION_FAILED.suggestion: Make sure the device is connected and scrcpy supports --list-encoders

VALIDATION.addressEmpty: Wireless device address cannot be empty
VALIDATION.addressInvalid: Wireless device address contains invalid characters
VALIDATION.fileInvalid: Please select a valid local file
VALIDATION.shellEmpty: ADB shell command cannot be empty
VALIDATION.noEncoders: No video encoders detected. scrcpy may be outdated or the device may not support encoding
